Off Calendar Sep-24-2018 Dismissal - No Appearance

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-24-2018 Continued To Sep-24-18 At 11:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted
Off Calendar Aug-13-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Shihlan Chen, Hunt & Henriques, appearing for Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.,
Telephone (408) 362-2295;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted.

Ruling: Plaintiff's motion for an Order that facts in requests for admission be admitted is unopposed and granted. A copy of the admissions to which this Order applies shall be attached to the Order and served on the Defendant with Notice of Entry.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a [proposed] order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling that complies with CRC 3.132 and is to be emailed to Judge Pro Tem Steven B. Stein at sbs@sbslawsf.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2018 Set For Trial On Sep-24-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
